location: NOT OBTAINABLE IN THE BASE GAME. This weapon is exclusive to the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — it's a random drop from rock-throwing Golem Smith enemies at Taylew's Ruined Forge in Rauh Base, in the Land of Shadow. There is no base-game source.
region: Rauh Base (Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — not a base-game region)
tactics: Flag for the data owner: base/fists.json lists this as base-game content, but every source (wiki.gg and Fextralife) confirms it debuted in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC with no base-game equivalent.
In the DLC, only golems that throw rocks (not the melee-only ones) can drop it, at roughly a 3% drop rate.
Farming benefits from higher Arcane or Item Discovery gear (e.g. Silver Scarab talisman).
lore: Described in-game as "a giant fist of fractured rock," its smithscript engravings let the wielder launch the whole fist forward in one heavy punch.

builds.name: Heavy Strength brawler
builds.why: 24 Str one-handed (16 two-handed) and 110 base physical damage make it one of the hardest-hitting pure-Strength fist weapons.
